title: Owned Inspection, Stable Listing, Release Preview, and Accessible Export · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs owned inspection, stable listing, release preview, and accessible export from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for offline collection manager and structured export after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice…
objectives: Keep owned inspection offline and return a typed not-owned outcome with explicit next commands.
Sort by documented ID or name policy, label totals and empty state, and retain stable output across reloads.
Construct an immutable preview, validate confirmation against exact identity, then return a new state and release event.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
